scripts.dev: concurrently -n root-config,mfe-one,mfe-two,mfe-three,mfe-four -c blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w root-config" "npm run dev -w mfe-one" "npm run dev -w mfe-two" "npm run dev -w mfe-three" "npm run dev -w mfe-four"
scripts.build: npm run build -w mfe-one && npm run build -w mfe-two && npm run build -w mfe-three && npm run build -w mfe-four && npm run build -w root-config
